experiences.title: Game Drives
experiences.desc: Private 4x4 safaris with expert guides across Tanzania's finest parks and reserves.
experiences.alt: Safari game drive on the Serengeti plains

experiences.title: Hiking & Walking
experiences.desc: Guided bush walks and scenic trails through untamed landscapes and highland forests.

experiences.title: Beach Holidays
experiences.desc: Pristine Indian Ocean coastlines paired with your safari adventure.
experiences.alt: Beach holiday on the Tanzanian coast

experiences.title: Balloon Safaris
experiences.desc: Sunrise flights over the Serengeti — a once-in-a-lifetime perspective on the plains.
experiences.alt: Hot air balloon safari at sunrise

experiences.title: Family Adventures
experiences.desc: Safe, engaging itineraries designed for families of all ages across every circuit.

experiences.title: Camping Safaris
experiences.desc: Authentic bush camps with luxury comfort beneath the African stars.
experiences.alt: Luxury tented camp under African stars

experiences.title: Culture Tours
experiences.desc: Maasai villages, Stone Town heritage and living traditions across Tanzania.

experiences.title: Nature Photography
experiences.desc: Specialist photo safaris with prime wildlife viewing positions and golden-hour timing.

experiences.title: Honeymoon Safaris
experiences.desc: Romantic bush retreats and private beach escapes crafted for two.

experiences.title: Sport Fishing
experiences.desc: Deep-sea and lake fishing adventures along Tanzania's coasts and Rift Valley lakes.

experiences.title: Museums & Monuments
experiences.desc: Explore Stone Town palaces, Bagamoyo slave-trade sites and Tanzania's living museum heritage.
experiences.alt: House of Wonders museum in Stone Town Zanzibar

experiences.title: Boat Safaris
experiences.desc: Glide along the Rufiji, Wami and Lake Tanganyika shorelines for hippos, crocodiles and birdlife.
experiences.alt: Boat safari on the Rufiji River in Nyerere National Park

experiences.title: Spice Farm Tours
experiences.desc: Walk fragrant clove, vanilla and cinnamon plantations on Zanzibar and Pemba.
experiences.alt: Fresh nutmeg on a Zanzibar spice farm tour

experiences.title: Historical Visits
experiences.desc: UNESCO ruins, slave-trade heritage and Swahili trading towns along the coast.
experiences.alt: Historic Sultan's Palace ruins at Kilwa Kisiwani

experiences.title: City Tours
experiences.desc: Explore Dar es Salaam, Arusha and Zanzibar Stone Town with local expert guides.

experiences.title: Hot Springs & Geothermal Pools
experiences.desc: Swim in crystal-clear geothermal pools at Chemka and Rundugai — perfect rest after a Kilimanjaro trek or northern safari.

experiences.title: Whale Watching
experiences.desc: Seasonal humpback whale encounters off the southern coast and Mafia Island.

experiences.title: Dhow Cruises
experiences.desc: Traditional wooden dhow sails at sunset along Zanzibar, Kilwa and the Swahili coast.
experiences.alt: Traditional dhow sunset cruise in Zanzibar
